settings.title: An escape designed for those who appreciate the extraordinary
settings.split1_desc: Our villas are designed to blur the line between indoor comfort and outdoor beauty.
settings.split2_desc: Our farm-to-table dining philosophy ensures every meal is a celebration of local flavors.

settings.title: Rainforest Suite
settings.desc: Floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the canopy. Private terrace with plunge pool.

settings.title: Ocean View Room
settings.desc: Panoramic ocean views from your private balcony. Spa-inspired bathroom.

settings.title: Garden Villa
settings.desc: Secluded villa surrounded by tropical gardens. Open-air living space.

settings.title: Spa & Wellness
settings.desc: Full-service spa with traditional and modern treatments in a rainforest setting

settings.title: Infinity Pool
settings.desc: Heated infinity pool overlooking the valley with poolside dining service

settings.title: Fine Dining
settings.desc: Farm-to-table restaurant featuring seasonal menus from local ingredients

settings.title: Guided Tours
settings.desc: Curated nature walks, waterfall hikes, and cultural experiences with local guides
